scripts.minify:js: terser script.js -o dist/script.min.js --compress --mangle && terser detect-touch.js -o dist/detect-touch.min.js --compress --mangle && terser index.js -o dist/index.min.js --compress --mangle && terser cart.js -o dist/cart.min.js --compress --mangle && terser shop/shop.js -o dist/shop.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run minify:main && npm run minify:js
